overall.description: Game engine footage depicting a first-person walk along a wet coastal road with palm trees, transitioning from a shaded tree-lined verge to an open ocean view, then approaching and entering the Del Air Bay Club complex. The wet pavement reflects the partly cloudy sky, suggesting recent rain clearing to bright morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-shaded roadside verge beside multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt verge under dense tree cover, parallel to the wet road

notable_agents.action: red SUV driving past on the wet asphalt road

entered.detail: dense green leafy branches forming a partial roof over the path
steep hillside covered with shrubs and scattered palm trees
wet multi-lane road with vehicles passing by
wooden telephone pole with power lines running along the road
temporary white barrier fencing along the hillside base

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dense tree canopy shading a dirt trail running parallel to a wet multi-lane road. The camera moves forward along the verge with a steep vegetated hillside on the left and passing vehicles on the right, creating a sheltered, enclosed atmosphere with dappled light filtering through the leaves.

events.description: exits the tree-covered verge into open coastal area with clear ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal sidewalk with the ocean visible to the right, passing palm trees

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving along the wet coastal road

entered.detail: calm blue ocean visible beyond the roadside vegetation
metal safety barrier separating the sidewalk from the road
tall palm trees lining the coastal road
wet asphalt road curving along the coastline

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shaded trees, the scene opens to a bright coastal vista with the ocean visible on the right. The camera walks along a sidewalk bordered by a guardrail and palm trees, with vehicles passing on the wet road to the left. The space feels expansive and exposed compared to the previous enclosed verge.

scene_state.functional_zone: country club parking lot with Mediterranean-style building

events.description: turns right off the coastal sidewalk into the Del Air Bay Club parking lot

agents.ego_description: turning into the parking lot and walking toward the club building entrance, observing the architecture

notable_agents.action: black SUV parked in front of the club's arched entrance

entered.detail: large white Mediterranean-style building with red tile roof and arched entrance, featuring 'Del Air Bay Club' signage
wet asphalt parking area with marked spaces and parked vehicles
metal fence bordering the parking lot

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into the Del Air Bay Club parking lot, transitioning from the coastal road to a built environment. The white Mediterranean-style club building dominates the view with its arched entrance and red tile roof. The parking lot is mostly empty with a few parked cars, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the bright sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor between club buildings

events.description: moves from open parking lot into narrow enclosed pathway between white building walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage between the club building and a hedge wall, moving toward the service area

entered.detail: concrete walkway between tall white walls with yellow parking lines
tall green hedge forming a living wall on the left side
smooth white stucco wall of the club building with small windows

segments.scene_description: Moving around the side of the club building, the camera enters a narrow, enclosed service corridor with white walls on the right and a tall hedge on the left. The space is shaded and quiet compared to the open parking lot, with the pathway leading toward a service entrance at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered, tree-lined roadside into an expansive coastal vista before concluding in the enclosed corridors of a resort. It begins under a dense canopy of trees along a dirt trail, moving forward through dappled light between a steep hillside and a wet multi-lane road. As the camera emerges from the shade, the environment opens into a bright, exposed landscape where palm trees line a sidewalk and the ocean stretches out to the right. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right into the Del Air Bay Club parking lot, moving across reflective wet pavement toward a white Mediterranean-style building with a red tile roof. Finally, the perspective narrows as the camera rounds the building and enters a quiet, shaded service corridor flanked by white walls and a tall hedge.
